summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdvantEdge360 v2 features. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) Backend proposal creation not saving new fields (category, requirement, scope_area, final_proposal), 2) Tasks page Select component crash due to empty string value. All 21 backend API tests pass. Frontend tested successfully for dashboard, proposals, projects, tasks pages with navigation and CRUD operations.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Proposal creation endpoint was missing new fields (category, requirement, scope_area, final_proposal) from payload
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added the missing fields to proposal_doc dictionary

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Select component crashing with 'SelectItem must have non-empty value' error due to empty string value for 'All Projects' option
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed value from empty string to 'all' and added logic to convert back when filtering

backend: POST /api/proposals - creates proposal with new fields (category, requirement, scope_area)
GET /api/tasks - lists tasks with project filter
GET /api/dashboard/team-tasks - returns team tasks for managers
frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats cards, My Tasks, Team Kanban
Dashboard stat cards are clickable and navigate to correct pages
Proposals page lists proposals with status badges
Proposal card click navigates to detail page
Proposal detail page displays all fields and actions
Create proposal form includes new fields (category, requirement, scope_area)
Projects page lists projects with completion progress
Project card click navigates to detail page
Project detail page shows stats and task list
Add Task within project detail page works
Task list view shows tasks with status/priority badges

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Backend server.py has many unused 'user' variable warnings (used for auth verification) - cosmetic issue only
Google Drive, Gmail, and Zoho Sign integrations are MOCKED - running in demo mode
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via MongoDB for testing. Multiple test proposals, projects, and tasks created during API and UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. New proposal fields (category, requirement, scope_area) properly saved and displayed. Tasks page Select component issue fixed. Proposal workflow (draft -> pending_approval -> approved -> signed -> converted) verified via API tests. Project detail page shows integrated task management with stats and task creation.

mocked_integrations.note: Google Drive, Gmail, Zoho Sign are in DEMO MODE - placeholder implementations
